read_only.description: If true, place_order and cancel_order are rejected at the adaptor level.

max_msg_rate.description: Sustained outbound message rate limit (msg/s). IBKR hard ceiling is 50.

reconnect_delay_s.description: Initial reconnect backoff delay in seconds.

reconnect_max_delay_s.description: Maximum reconnect backoff delay in seconds.

next_valid_id_timeout_s.description: Timeout in seconds waiting for nextValidId handshake after connect.
